indicators.name: Couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is too large and close to the window, making it difficult to focus on the computer screen.

indicators.name: Chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is positioned near the desk, providing a comfortable place to sit while working.

indicators.name: Desk
indicators.rationale: The desk is spacious enough to accommodate a computer setup and other necessary items.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a large couch that obstructs the view of the computer screen, but it has a comfortable chair and a spacious desk.
